title: Contribution-Graph Search config
description: Customize the robot animation. All fields are optional; omitted values fall back to sensible defaults. The GitHub username is taken from the repository owner automatically, so you normally do not set it here.

username.description: Override the GitHub login to visualise. Defaults to the repository owner in CI.

behavior.description: escape: reach the farthest-right cell. explore: coverage tour. wander: random walk. patrol: perimeter loop. wall_follow: left-hand-rule reactive navigation.

planner.description: Path-planning algorithm (ignored by the reactive wall_follow behavior).

beamCount.description: Beams per 360 degree scan. Higher = smoother scan polygon, larger SVG.

lidarSamples.description: LIDAR scans computed across the loop (animation frames). Higher = smoother, larger SVG.

allowDiagonal.description: Allow 8-connected diagonal movement (corner-cutting is always forbidden).

seed.description: Fixed PRNG seed. Omit to vary daily (day-of-year), which keeps wander/explore fresh.
